Issue: Session cache uses a single key
Fix: Key the cache by user id / token (e.g. session_cache[user_id])
Why it fixes the test: Prevents one user’s login from overwriting another’s session.

Fix: Ensure the repository mock returns a Conversation DTO for the id used in the test, or seed the test database with that conversation.
Why it fixes the test: The service can then return the expected conversation.

Fix: Add await when calling repo.delete(...) inside the service, or make the method async def and return await repo.delete(...).
Why it fixes the test: The test will then receive a real boolean.

Fix: Patch the exact repository method (update_setting/update_user_setting) that the service uses, or rename the service method so that the test’s expected call matches the real call.
Why it fixes the test: The mock will then see the expected call.
